cases.question: Using a quantified path expression with the {1,2} quantifier, find all organizations reachable from 'Blackstone' through 1 to 2 HAS_SUBSIDIARY hops. Use a literal string match. Return distinct organization names, limited to 20.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (root:Organization {name: 'Blackstone'})-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-{1,2}(org:Organization)
RETURN DISTINCT org.name AS name
LIMIT 20

cases.question: Using a quantified path expression with the {1,} quantifier (one or more hops), find any organization reachable from 'Blackstone' through one or more HAS_SUBSIDIARY relationships (any depth). Use a literal string match. Return a count of distinct reachable organizations.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (root:Organization {name: 'Blackstone'})-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-{1,}(org:Organization)
RETURN count(DISTINCT org) AS reachableCount

cases.question: Find the top 5 organizations with the most total connections (counting all relationship types combined: HAS_SUBSIDIARY, MENTIONS, HAS_CATEGORY). Use pattern: MATCH (o:Organization)-[r]-() to count all relationship instances. Return organization name and total degree count, ordered by degree descending.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (o:Organization)-[r]-()
RETURN o.name AS organization, count(r) AS degree
ORDER BY degree DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: Use the db.index.fulltext.queryNodes procedure to search the 'entity' fulltext index for organizations whose name matches 'Amazon'. Then for each matching organization, use a CALL subquery to collect the titles of all articles mentioning it. Return organization name and list of article titles.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('entity', 'Amazon') YIELD node AS org, score
WHERE org:Organization
CALL (org) {
  MATCH (org)<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article)
  RETURN collect(a.title) AS articleTitles
}
RETURN org.name AS organizationName, articleTitles
ORDER BY score DESC

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Use a CALL subquery to compute per-organization metrics for the top 20 most-mentioned organizations: inside the CALL, compute the count of direct subsidiaries. Outside, also compute the average article sentiment. Return organizations with their subsidiary count and avg sentiment, ordered by avg sentiment ascending.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (o:Organization)<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article)
WITH o, count(a) AS mentionCount, avg(a.sentiment) AS avgSentiment
ORDER BY mentionCount DESC
LIMIT 20
CALL (o) {
  MATCH (o)<-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-(sub:Organization)
  RETURN count(sub) AS subsidiaryCount
}
RETURN o.name AS organization, subsidiaryCount, avgSentiment
ORDER BY avgSentiment ASC

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Find organizations that appear together in articles with both positive sentiment (>0.3) AND negative sentiment (<-0.3) — i.e., the same two organizations are co-mentioned in at least one positive article and at least one negative article. Return the organization pair and counts for each sentiment type. Limit to 10 pairs.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (o1:Organization)<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o2:Organization)
WHERE o1.name < o2.name
WITH o1, o2,
     COUNT { MATCH (o1)<-[:MENTIONS]-(pos:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o2) WHERE pos.sentiment > 0.3 } AS posCount,
     COUNT { MATCH (o1)<-[:MENTIONS]-(neg:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o2) WHERE neg.sentiment < -0.3 } AS negCount
WHERE posCount > 0 AND negCount > 0
RETURN o1.name AS org1, o2.name AS org2, posCount, negCount
ORDER BY posCount + negCount DESC
LIMIT 10

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Use COUNT subquery expressions to find organizations where the number of articles mentioning them is greater than the number of their direct subsidiaries. Return the organization name, article count, and subsidiary count. Limit to 10 results.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (o:Organization)
WITH o,
     COUNT { (o)<-[:MENTIONS]-(:Article) } AS articleCount,
     COUNT { (o)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(:Organization) } AS subsidiaryCount
WHERE articleCount > subsidiaryCount
RETURN o.name AS organization, articleCount, subsidiaryCount
ORDER BY articleCount DESC
LIMIT 10

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Find organizations linked to the same HAS_CATEGORY target node AND both mentioned in the same article. Traverse: (o1)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(cat)<-[:HAS_CATEGORY]-(o2) and (a)-[:MENTIONS]->(o1), (a)-[:MENTIONS]->(o2). Return category name, organization pair names, and co-mention count. Limit to 10.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (o1:Organization)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(cat)<-[:HAS_CATEGORY]-(o2:Organization)
WHERE elementId(o1) < elementId(o2)
MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o1)
MATCH (a)-[:MENTIONS]->(o2)
WITH cat.name AS category, o1.name AS org1, o2.name AS org2, count(DISTINCT a) AS coMentionCount
RETURN category, org1, org2, coMentionCount
ORDER BY coMentionCount DESC
LIMIT 10

cases.question: Using COLLECT subquery expressions, for each organization return: its name, a collected list of its subsidiary names (via HAS_SUBSIDIARY), and a collected list of distinct category names (via HAS_CATEGORY). Filter to organizations that have at least 1 subsidiary. Return ordered by organization name, limit to 20.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE EXISTS { (o)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->() }
RETURN o.name AS organization,
       COLLECT { MATCH (o)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(s:Organization) RETURN s.name } AS subsidiaries,
       COLLECT { MATCH (o)-[:HAS_CATEGORY]->(c:Category) RETURN DISTINCT c.name } AS categories
ORDER BY organization
LIMIT 20

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected
